description: You are a telecom field inspector conducting a lifecycle assessment of utility poles in the Kansas City service territory using the pole_inventory layer in utility_pole_inspection.gpkg. Update the replacement_flag to 'SCHEDULE' for all wood poles installed before 2010 with a condition rating of Fair, Poor, or Critical, and record the triggering criteria in the work_order_notes field. Ensure all other poles have the replacement_flag set to 'OK' and save all edits to the geopackage.

metadata.data_source: OpenStreetMap power infrastructure, Kansas City metro
